accepted_risks: Reviewer is the same agent as the extractor; independent re-review is recommended before the skill is switched to active.
Only single-channel text extraction was performed; rendered-page dual pass was not completed by an independent reviewer.
Document is 110 pages; appendices and learning-objective pages were sampled but not fully audited.
Official URL and exact retrieved_at are not verified in local archive metadata.
Page references use printed/footer page numbers, which are offset from physical PDF pages. Any downstream tool using physical page numbers must apply the offset.

findings.issue: Appendix 1 contains many example sentences; only communicative-function categories were summarised, not every example.
findings.required_fix: Builder should treat Appendix 1 as reference, not as assessable content; sample key functions only.

findings.issue: Curriculum organisation section describes modules/compulsory/elective parts at a high level; detailed module list not extracted into discrete topics.
findings.required_fix: Builder to decide whether modules become topics or references based on DSE skill scope.
